'''jogadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:swampish|swampish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-g-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swampish|swampish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jogadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jogadithi|jogadithi]] || [[word:jogadiji|jogadiji]] || [[word:jogadishi|jogadishi]] || [[word:jogadiki|jogadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jogaduthuthu|jogaduthuthu]] || [[word:jogadujuju|jogadujuju]] || [[word:jogadushushu|jogadushushu]] || [[word:jogadukuku|jogadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jogaduthu|jogaduthu]] || [[word:jogaduju|jogaduju]] || [[word:jogadushu|jogadushu]] || [[word:jogaduku|jogaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jogadufthuf|jogadufthuf]] || [[word:jogadufjuf|jogadufjuf]] || [[word:jogadufshuf|jogadufshuf]] || [[word:jogadufkuf|jogadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jogadethe|jogadethe]] || [[word:jogadeje|jogadeje]] || [[word:jogadeshe|jogadeshe]] || [[word:jogadeke|jogadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jogadothotho|jogadothotho]] || [[word:jogadojojo|jogadojojo]] || [[word:jogadoshosho|jogadoshosho]] || [[word:jogadokoko|jogadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jogadotho|jogadotho]] || [[word:jogadojo|jogadojo]] || [[word:jogadosho|jogadosho]] || [[word:jogadoko|jogadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jogadofthof|jogadofthof]] || [[word:jogadofjof|jogadofjof]] || [[word:jogadofshof|jogadofshof]] || [[word:jogadofkof|jogadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfthÃŸf|jogadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfjÃŸf|jogadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfshÃŸf|jogadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfkÃŸf|jogadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|jogadÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|jogadÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|jogadÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|jogadÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfthÃŸf|jogadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfjÃŸf|jogadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfshÃŸf|jogadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfkÃŸf|jogadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfthÃŸf|jogadÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfjÃŸf|jogadÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfshÃŸf|jogadÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:jogadÃŸfkÃŸf|jogadÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jogadÃḊthÃḊ|jogadÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:jogadÃḊjÃḊ|jogadÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:jogadÃḊshÃḊ|jogadÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:jogadÃḊkÃḊ|jogadÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jogadathatha|jogadathatha]] || [[word:jogadajaja|jogadajaja]] || [[word:jogadashasha|jogadashasha]] || [[word:jogadakaka|jogadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jogadatha|jogadatha]] || [[word:jogadaja|jogadaja]] || [[word:jogadasha|jogadasha]] || [[word:jogadaka|jogadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jogadafthaf|jogadafthaf]] || [[word:jogadafjaf|jogadafjaf]] || [[word:jogadafshaf|jogadafshaf]] || [[word:jogadafkaf|jogadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jogadasha|jogadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jogadshÃḋsha|jogadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jogadrosha|jogadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jogadmusha|jogadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jogadyasha|jogadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojogadnkshÃḋsha|gojogadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojogadnkrosha|gojogadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojogadnkmusha|gojogadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojogadnkyasha|gojogadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jogagadasha|jogagadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jogagadshÃḋsha|jogagadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jogagadrosha|jogagadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jogagadmusha|jogagadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jogagadyasha|jogagadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojogagadnkshÃḋsha|gojogagadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojogagadnkrosha|gojogagadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojogagadnkmusha|gojogagadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojogagadnkyasha|gojogagadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jegÃḊdasha|jegÃḊdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jegÃḊdshÃḋsha|jegÃḊdshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jegÃḊdrosha|jegÃḊdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jegÃḊdmusha|jegÃḊdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jegÃḊdyasha|jegÃḊdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojegÃḊdnkshÃḋsha|gojegÃḊdnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojegÃḊdnkrosha|gojegÃḊdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojegÃḊdnkmusha|gojegÃḊdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojegÃḊdnkyasha|gojegÃḊdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jogfadasha|jogfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jogfadshÃḋsha|jogfadshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jogfadrosha|jogfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jogfadmusha|jogfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jogfadyasha|jogfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojogfadnkshÃḋsha|gojogfadnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojogfadnkrosha|gojogfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojogfadnkmusha|gojogfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojogfadnkyasha|gojogfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
